category_sources: source_facts.description says DOSBox Staging is a modernized DOSBox soft-fork; official site describes it as a modern continuation of DOSBox.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is dosbox-staging; official site identifies the project as DOSBox Staging.
docs_sources: Official DOSBox Staging site provides Getting started and User manual documentation sections.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/dosbox-staging/dosbox-staging, so repo lookup was intentionally skipped.
tags_sources: source_facts.description, source_facts.homepage, and official site support DOS emulator, games, retro-computing, and cross-platform tags.
